productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women  Winter Purple Shirt
description: Composition Purple shirt made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex, has a tipped collar and front buttoned placket, full arm cuff sleeves and embroidered Big Ben logo on left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Take formal dressing to the next level with this purple shirt from united colors of benetton. This ever-classic colour suits all occasions, and the cotton fabric is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with formal pants and leather slip-on shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and tennis shoes for a semi-formal touche. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 5'8", Chest: 33"
